content.text: Haryana UG / PG 2nd / 3rd / 4th Year Admission 2026 : The Department of Higher Education, Haryana (DGHE) has officially announced the admission and promotion schedule for students seeking admission to the 2nd, 3rd, and 4th year of Undergraduate (UG) and Postgraduate (PG) programmes for the academic session 2026-27. Students studying in Government, Government-Aided, and Self-Finance colleges across Haryana must complete their admission process through the official online portal within the prescribed dates.

content.text: Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Selection Test (JNVST) 2027 : Get complete details about NVS Class 6th Admission 2027, including admission updates, important dates, application fees, eligibility criteria, age limit, selection process, syllabus, exam pattern, admit card, result, and more.

rows.text: Navodaya Vidyalaya Samiti (NVS) NVS Class 6th Admission 2027-28 Short Details of Advt Notification
Notification Out : 07/07/2026 Starting Date : 07/07/2026 Last Date : 31/07/2026 11:59 PM Exam Date : 28/11/2026 Admit Card : Before Exam Date Result Declaration : End of March 2027 (Tentative)

Candidate Must be Studying in Class V during the academic session 2026-27 in a recognized school (Govt./ Govt. Aided/ Recognized/ NIOS). Candidate Must be Bonafide resident of the same district where he/she is seeking admission. Must have studied Classes III, IV, and V by spending one full academic session in each class. Candidates who have passed class V before the session 2026-27 or repeater candidates are not eligible.

At least 75% seats are reserved for candidates from rural areas. Reservation for SC, ST and OBC candidates will be provided as per Government of India norms. Minimum one-third seats are reserved for girls. Reservation is also available for eligible Divyang candidates.
Passport-size Photograph Candidate’s Signature Parent’s Signature Aadhaar Number or Residence Certificate Category Certificate (If Applicable) Disability Certificate (If Applicable)
